title: cereus triangularis f. guatemalensis
intro: Cereus triangularis f. guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan columnar cactus, is a species of cactus that is native to Guatemala and belongs to the Cereus genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and other health issues. The health benefits of Cereus triangularis f. guatemalensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying the stems and leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or applied topically as an ointment or salve.
